creator: john@sanren.ac.za
text:
Created attachment 215938
update of www/py-requests-oauthlib to 1.3.0

Here is a patch to upgrade www/py-requests-oauthlib to 1.3.0

https://github.com/requests/requests-oauthlib/releases

It will need the update of security/py-oauthlib in

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=247539
